style_summary: A maximalist K-pop fashion zine collage style built from a central portrait cutout, crumpled monochrome paper texture, skewed ransom-note typography, loud sticker blocks, saturated lime/blue/red accents, and a bold bottom masthead band.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main subject, performer, model, musician, dancer, stylist, or youth-culture character
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: looking off-frame, posing with attitude, holding a prop, leaning into the camera, or standing in a cutout portrait pose
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: compact camera, wired earbuds, lip gloss, denim jacket, cassette, charm bag, safety pin accessory, or styling prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: studio wall, backstage corner, bedroom mirror, subway entrance, alley poster wall, roof landing, or DIY magazine set
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: crumpled black paper, distressed denim texture, torn white paper edges, photocopy grain, halftone noise, tape marks, and rough scanned shadows
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: oversized warped headline or sticker headline
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: short editorial caption, mock issue line, styling note, lyric-like fragment, or repeated microcopy
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: red star, diagonal sticker block, torn label, arrow tab, barcode stripe, or paper shard
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: post-apocalyptic K-pop styling, distressed denim, glossy makeup, messy hair, bright accessory accents, layered streetwear

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A maximalist K-pop fashion zine collage style built from a central portrait cutout, crumpled monochrome paper texture, skewed ransom-note typography, loud sticker blocks, saturated lime/blue/red accents, and a bold bottom masthead band.
Use a dark crumpled black paper background with BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS worked into the collage texture.
Place the subject as a large central portrait cutout with a thick irregular torn white paper border.
Add oversized warped display typography reading MAIN_TEXT as a tilted collage layer, plus smaller sticker blocks and side editorial captions reading SECONDARY_TEXT.
Use acid lime, electric blue, alert red, paper white, and ink black.
Finish with a saturated bottom masthead strip, rough photocopy grain, halftone speckles, scan noise, uneven paper shadows, and DIY magazine collage energy.
Keep the same visual genre, density level, and rendering mode across new subjects.
Preserve the original balance between main subject, typography, decorative marks, and background texture.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A maximalist K-pop fashion zine collage style built from a central portrait cutout, crumpled monochrome paper texture, skewed ransom-note typography, loud sticker blocks, saturated lime/blue/red accents, and a bold bottom masthead band.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.layout: Keep the subject hierarchy, crop behavior, framing, and density described by the prompt_template.
composition.subject: Use SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION as the primary visual anchor, scaled and positioned according to the style identity.
composition.scene: Use LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS for setting detail without changing the visual genre.
composition.text: Place MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT as designed graphic elements, not as long paragraphs.

typography.main_text: MAIN_TEXT should be short, legible, and visually integrated with the poster or image system.
typography.secondary_text: SECONDARY_TEXT should read as small caption, label, route note, slogan, or microcopy.
typography.style: Match the typography behavior described by the style summary and prompt_template, including scale, distortion, texture, and placement.

color_palette.palette_behavior: Use the dominant colors, contrast rhythm, and accent-color logic implied by the style summary.
color_palette.background: Keep the background color family consistent with the reference style.
color_palette.accents: Use ACCENT_SYMBOL and graphic marks to carry small high-contrast color moments.

design_rules: Use a dark crumpled black paper background with BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS worked into the collage texture.
Place the subject as a large central portrait cutout with a thick irregular torn white paper border.
Add oversized warped display typography reading MAIN_TEXT as a tilted collage layer, plus smaller sticker blocks and side editorial captions reading SECONDARY_TEXT.
Use acid lime, electric blue, alert red, paper white, and ink black.
Place ACCENT_SYMBOL near the portrait as a sticker-like emphasis mark.
Finish with a saturated bottom masthead strip, rough photocopy grain, halftone speckles, scan noise, uneven paper shadows, and DIY magazine collage energy.
Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied publication logos, or exact source text.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} K-pop apocalypse ransom zine poster featuring {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, styled in {WARDROBE_STYLE}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Use a dark crumpled black paper background with {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Place the subject as a large central portrait cutout with a thick irregular torn white paper border. Add oversized warped display typography reading "{MAIN_TEXT}" as a tilted collage layer, plus smaller sticker blocks and side editorial captions reading "{SECONDARY_TEXT}". Use acid lime, electric blue, alert red, paper white, and ink black. Add {ACCENT_SYMBOL} near the portrait. Finish with a saturated bottom masthead strip, rough photocopy grain, halftone speckles, scan noise, uneven paper shadows, and DIY magazine collage energy. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied publication logos, or exact source text.
negative_prompt: minimalist design, clean corporate layout, smooth gradients, luxury editorial polish, pastel lifestyle palette, glossy 3D typography, elegant serif masthead, empty whitespace, platform watermark, username, QR code, creator ID, app logo, copied publication logo, exact source text, exact source name

values.SUBJECT: a silver-haired idol in a torn black jacket
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: holding a cracked emergency radio toward the camera
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: spray-painted portable radio with neon tape
values.LOCATION: abandoned subway platform with ripped posters
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: crumpled monochrome paper, warning labels, torn tape, sticker arrows, lime scan bars, and red editorial blocks
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: lime hazard star and blue tape strip
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: K-pop stagewear mixed with survival straps, glossy boots, and messy silver hair

values.SUBJECT: a fashion stylist with blunt bangs and chrome goggles
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pinning a ransom-note jacket on a rooftop bunker door
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: patched tactical jacket covered in sticker labels
values.LOCATION: windy city rooftop after a fictional blackout
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: ripped grayscale skyline, photocopied concrete, red tape, cyan scribbles, barcode scraps, and warning stickers
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: layered K-pop apocalypse styling with belts, pins, torn mesh, and glossy makeup

values.SUBJECT: a vocalist in mirrored sunglasses and a black vinyl coat
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: singing into a taped microphone inside a fractured rehearsal room
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: chrome microphone wrapped in caution tape
values.LOCATION: broken mirror rehearsal studio with scattered flyers
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: collaged grayscale paper shards, lime sticker blocks, red ransom type, blue marker slashes, and torn photo edges
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: sharp idol styling with vinyl coat, chain belt, messy wet-look hair, and stage gloves

values.SUBJECT: a dance leader with pink streaked hair
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: marking choreography counts on a ripped wall poster
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: folded choreography sheet and spray can
values.LOCATION: narrow alley plastered with monochrome gig flyers
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: ransom-note type strips, torn tape, photocopy noise, sticker stars, lime arrows, and red warning labels
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized stage hoodie, pleated skirt, combat boots, and layered idol accessories
